generic-deliverable.description: Pipeline enxuto para entregaveis estruturados em qualquer dominio.

steps.name: Data Ingester
steps.task: Load and normalize input data from files, APIs, or databases. Output structured JSON for downstream steps.
steps.acceptance: All declared data sources loaded. Output is valid JSON with expected schema.
steps._implantador_note: REPLACE THIS with a real ingestion script for the user's data sources. This is a placeholder.

steps.name: Context Analyzer
steps.task: Evaluate context, constraints, and execution risks for the deliverable. Recommend proceed or pause.
steps.acceptance: Recommendation is explicit, justified, and actionable for downstream agents.

steps.name: Insight Writer
steps.task: Produce ranked insights and structure recommendations based on ingested data.
steps.acceptance: Every insight references specific data from the ingested source.

steps.name: Draft Writer
steps.task: Draft the main deliverable, preserving factual accuracy and progressive structure.
steps.acceptance: Draft matches the brief, uses only grounded claims, and is complete enough for review.

steps.name: Output Validator
steps.task: Cross-check draft output against source data. Verify numbers, dates, and references match the ingested data.
steps.acceptance: Zero mismatches between draft claims and source data. Discrepancies logged.
steps._implantador_note: CUSTOMIZE: add domain-specific validation rules (e.g., check financial totals, verify legal citations).

steps.name: Report Synthesizer
steps.task: Compile final report incorporating validation feedback. Structure for the chosen template.
steps.acceptance: Report is complete, all validation issues resolved, ready for rendering.

steps.name: HTML Renderer
steps.task: Render final report to HTML using Jinja2 template.
steps.acceptance: HTML file generated in report/ directory.

steps.name: HTML Quality Checker
steps.task: Validate HTML output: no markdown artifacts, correct lang attribute, no mixed languages, professional appearance.
steps.acceptance: HTML passes all quality checks. No raw **bold** or _italic_, lang matches pipeline language, no English terms in Portuguese report.

analysis-report.description: Pipeline completo para relatorios analiticos com narrativa executiva e auditoria.

steps.name: Data Ingester
steps.task: Load and normalize input data from all declared sources.
steps.acceptance: All data loaded and validated.
steps._implantador_note: REPLACE with real ingestion scripts for each data source.

steps.name: Domain Specialist
steps.task: Evaluate context and propose execution strategy based on ingested data.
steps.acceptance: Recommendation is explicit and justified.

steps.name: Data Auditor
steps.task: Build factsheet from source data with traceable keys.
steps.acceptance: All numeric claims map to source fields.

steps.name: Insight Explorer
steps.task: Identify ranked insights and implications.
steps.acceptance: Each insight cites evidence from the factsheet.

steps.name: Executive Writer
steps.task: Draft the executive narrative with implications.
steps.acceptance: Tone and scope align with the brief.

steps.name: Technical Writer
steps.task: Write detailed technical sections with references.
steps.acceptance: No contradiction with the executive draft.

steps.name: Output Validator
steps.task: Cross-check all LLM outputs against source data. Flag numeric mismatches and unsupported claims.
steps.acceptance: Zero critical discrepancies.

steps.name: Report Synthesizer
steps.task: Compile final report, resolve validation issues, structure for template.
steps.acceptance: Complete report, all validation issues addressed.

steps.name: HTML Renderer
steps.task: Render final report to HTML using Jinja2 template.
steps.acceptance: HTML file generated in report/ directory.

steps.name: HTML Quality Checker
steps.task: Validate HTML: no markdown artifacts, correct lang, no mixed languages, professional appearance.
steps.acceptance: HTML passes all quality checks.

steps.name: External Auditor
steps.task: Independent cold audit of the final deliverable. Score accuracy, completeness, consistency.
steps.acceptance: Audit includes score 1-10, issues by severity.

teaching-materials.description: Pipeline pedagogico para materiais didaticos com exercicios e revisao.

steps.name: Data Ingester
steps.task: Load curriculum data, reference materials, and learner profiles.
steps.acceptance: All input data loaded and structured.
steps._implantador_note: REPLACE with real data loading (curriculum PDFs, syllabus files, etc.).

steps.name: Curriculum Analyzer
steps.task: Analyze curriculum context, learner profile, and pedagogical constraints.
steps.acceptance: Pedagogical constraints and scope are explicit.

steps.name: Lesson Planner
steps.task: Plan the lesson sequence, pacing, and learning objectives.
steps.acceptance: Plan covers objectives, pacing, and assessment checkpoints.

steps.name: Slide Writer
steps.task: Write slide content with clear progression, examples, and prompts.
steps.acceptance: Slides follow the lesson plan and are classroom-ready.

steps.name: Exercise Creator
steps.task: Create exercises, answer keys, and formative checks.
steps.acceptance: Exercises cover the objectives and include answer guidance.

steps.name: Output Validator
steps.task: Validate pedagogical alignment: exercises match objectives, slides cover all topics.
steps.acceptance: Zero coverage gaps between objectives and materials.

steps.name: Pedagogical Reviewer
steps.task: Review pedagogical coherence, accessibility, and workload balance.
steps.acceptance: Review identifies pacing or clarity issues with actionable corrections.

steps.name: Materials Assembler
steps.task: Assemble the final teaching pack with slides, exercises, and corrections.
steps.acceptance: Teaching pack is complete and all critical review items are resolved.

steps.name: HTML Quality Checker
steps.task: Validate HTML: no markdown artifacts, correct lang, no mixed languages, professional appearance.
steps.acceptance: HTML passes all quality checks.
